nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives DRIVE_TREE_CREATED events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts event data and calculates step_key for file sync

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate processing

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: either DONE or IN_PROGRESS

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  file_name,
  mime_type,
  storage_path,
  'project-files' as storage_bucket
FROM project_files 
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid
  AND drive_file_id IS NULL
  AND file_type IN ('INTAKE_PDF', 'INTAKE_ORDER')
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

nodes.name: Fetch Unsynced Files
nodes.notes: Gets all project files that haven't been synced to Drive yet

nodes.name: Has Files?
nodes.notes: Check if there are files to sync

parameters.query:
SELECT drive_folder_id 
FROM project_drive_folders 
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid
  AND folder_type = 'AUFTRAG';

nodes.name: Fetch Auftrag Folder
nodes.notes: Gets the 01_Auftrag folder ID from Drive folders

nodes.name: Prepare File Items
nodes.notes: Prepares each file for download and upload

nodes.name: Download from Storage
nodes.notes: Downloads file from Supabase Storage (public bucket)

nodes.name: Upload to Drive
nodes.notes: Uploads file to 01_Auftrag folder in Google Drive

nodes.name: Collect Upload Results
nodes.notes: Collects all upload results and builds SQL update

nodes.name: Update project_files
nodes.notes: Updates project_files with drive_file_id and drive_file_url

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks workflow step as DONE

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE
nodes.notes: Marks input event processed, emits DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE

nodes.name: Done (Main Path)
nodes.notes: Success response for main path with files

nodes.name: Prepare No Files
nodes.notes: Prepares data when no files need syncing

nodes.name: Complete Step (No Files)
nodes.notes: Completes workflow step even with no files

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE (No Files)
nodes.notes: Emits event when no files needed syncing

nodes.name: Done (No Files)
nodes.notes: Success response for no-files path

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles already claimed or done steps

nodes.name: Should Emit Event?
nodes.notes: If already done, still emit DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE

nodes.name: Prepare Skip Emit
nodes.notes: Prepares data for skip path emit

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE (Skip)
nodes.notes: Emits event when reusing previous sync result

nodes.name: Done (Skip Path)
nodes.notes: Success for skip path

nodes.name: Done (Exit)
nodes.notes: Exit when in progress
